title: W-165 planetary turbolaser

{{Quote|The first, last, and ''only'' line of defense your planet will ever need!|[[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] catalogue listing|<ref name="NEGWT" />}}
The '''w-165 planetary turbolaser''' was a heavy [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] manufactured by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]]. At the time of its introduction, it was the most powerful planetary turbolaser ever built, and was four times as powerful as the [[V-150 Planet Defender/Legends|v-150 Planet Defender]] .

==Description==
One of the most powerful [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]] to be constructed, the [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] w-165 planetary turbolaser<ref name="EGWT" /> was a massive [[Planet/Legends|planet]]-based weapon that included the turbolaser weapon and a stabilizing platform measuring one hundred and fifty [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in diameter. The emplacement was designed to be operated in any environment and was equipped with eight stabilizer legs that could support the emplacement on unstable terrain such as ice. The emplacements could even be positioned in bodies of water such as lakes or [[Ocean/Legends|seas]], using [[flotation platform]]s and [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]] [[anchor cable]]s to maintain stable positions.<ref name="NEGWT" /> Each unit cost ten million [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].<ref name="EGWT" />

Although protected by [[Armor/Legends|armor]] and [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|deflector shield generators]], it was common for [[Engineer/Legends|engineers]] to bury the base platform underneath rock or earth as an additional layer of defense. With a [[Power core/Legends|power core]] generating enough energy to power a [[City/Legends|city]],<ref name="NEGWT" /> the w-165 planetary turbolaser had a power output that was almost four times that of the [[V-150 Planet Defender/Legends|v-150 Planet Defender]] [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]]. The [[Reactor/Legends|reactor]] powering the weapon was over fifty meters in diameter, allowing the w-165 to fire a shot every ten [[Standard second|seconds]]. The power that was processed by the [[turbolaser actuator]] was enough to energy to power a large city for a full [[Standard day/Legends|day]].<ref name="EGWT" />

The turbolaser's [[Barrel/Legends|barrel]] was almost twenty-five meters in diameter, and incorporated three [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] of [[Galven circuit/Legends|galven circuitry]] threaded through the barrel.<ref name="EGWT" /> The [[Emitter nozzle|Emitter Tip]] produced one of the largest [[Laser/Legends|laser]] beams in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], with only [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapons]] such as the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|DS-1 Orbital Battle Station's]] [[Superlaser/Legends|superlaser]] being able to match the w-165 for range and power.<ref name="NEGWT" />

The turbolaser had over four dozen [[overload dispersal tube]]s around the barrel to absorb excess energy from the firing process which protected the weapon against accidental explosions that could occur during a malfunction. [[Targeting sensor/Legends|Targeting sensors]] and deflector shield generators were positioned around the weapon itself, and the turbolaser actuator, located at the bottom of the weapon and wrapped in armor plating, was ringed by a [[cooling sleeve]] designed to keep the weapon within safe operating temperatures.<ref name="EGWT" /> During operation, all of the weapon's components were carefully monitored.<ref name="NEGWT" />

The massive turbolaser was housed on a stable, permanent platform that included the crew stations and power core. The platform was protected by four meters of [[Permacite/Legends|permacite]] armor and deflector shield generators strong enough to defend against ordnance including turbolaser blasts and [[Proton bomb/Legends|proton bombs]]. The platform also housed the weapon's [[capacitor bank]]s.<ref name="EGWT" /> The w-165 required a crew of nearly fifty personnel to operate, including [[Gunner/Legends|gunners]], [[Technician/Legends|technicians]], engineers, and [[Computer/Legends|computer]] operators. They operated from gunner stations located within the platform, while [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] patrolled the platform to guard against external infiltration and attack.<ref name="NEGWT" />

The targeting computers of the w-165 were constantly fed information from [[Sensor array/Legends|sensor arrays]] on the platform, or from dedicated [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] stations and [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] [[Satellite/Legends|satellites]].<ref name="EGWT" /> The collected data was processed through a global network which fed targeting vectors to all of the turbolasers on the planet.<ref name="NEGWT" /> [[Rotation gear]]s slowly repositioned the turbolaser to fire on selected targets, and continuous adjustments were made to maintain accuracy.<ref name="EGWT" /> The platform could rotate the barrel three hundred and sixty degrees, and move the turret in a complete arc of one hundred and eighty degrees. Although this allowed the w-165 to switch targets methodically, an individual weapon still had a limited fire vector. To be effective, a planet needed more than a hundred individual turbolasers.<ref name="NEGWT" />

The w-165 had an optimum effective range of 1,100 kilometers, and a maximum effective range of 9,600 kilometers.<ref name="NEGWT" /> Sustained volleys from the w-165 were capable of punching through the armor plating of an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] and destroying the [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] by piercing the main reactor.<ref name="EGWT" />

==History==
Networks of w-165s were constructed on over three hundred [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]-allied planets. Despite the large cost per emplacement, the New Republic considered the expenditure a wise investment.<ref name="EGWT" />

==Sources==
